title: The AI Visibility Audit
subtitle: Find out exactly how ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, and Gemini describe your business. £99, delivered in 48 hours.

steps.title: Are you invisible to the AI that buyers now ask first?
steps.subtitle: Most owners have never seen what ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, and Gemini say about them. In 48 hours, we'll show you across 50 questions. £99.

steps.question: What's your role in the business?
Why are you looking at this now?
steps.help: Choose the closest fit. We'll dig deeper in the report.

choices.label: We're getting fewer organic enquiries than last year
Customers keep saying 'I asked ChatGPT and it didn't mention you'
A competitor seems to be everywhere in AI answers

steps.question: Name 1-3 competitors you'd like us to benchmark against.
steps.help: Just brand names is fine. We'll handle the rest.

quotes.quote: It pinpointed exactly where ChatGPT was confidently wrong about us. We fixed it in a week.
quotes.author: Founder, UK SaaS

quotes.quote: I'd never have known Claude was recommending our biggest competitor by default.
quotes.author: Marketing Director, services firm

quotes.quote: Fastest £99 I've spent on marketing this year.
quotes.author: Ecommerce owner

steps.question: What's your website?
steps.help: We start the audit from here.

steps.question: Where should we send the report?
steps.help: You'll get a confirmation right after this step and the full report in 48 hours.

steps.title: Locked in. Last step: pay £99 and we start tonight.
steps.body: You'll get the 50-question audit, the 5-pillar AEO scorecard, and a prioritised action list within 48 hours of payment.
